title: rubus niveus
intro: Rubus niveus, also known as the White Himalayan Raspberry or Snow Raspberry, is a perennial shrub native to the Himalayan region, belonging to the Rosaceae family of plants. The Rubus niveus plant has been utilized in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Rubus niveus include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve cardiovascular health, and exhibit anti-cancer properties. The herbal preparations of Rubus niveus include tea, tincture, and decoction, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal benefits.
